caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold, and black headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. To his left, a white backdrop features a repetitive yellow logo with the word "HUSTLE" and five stars. Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with red and white text is visible on the table to his right. A small logo in the lower-left corner contains a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, looking slightly to the left with a neutral to thoughtful expression. There is very little movement between the frames, with only slight shifts in his facial expression and posture as he listens or prepares to speak.
